nasb.text: Your navel is like a round goblet Which never lacks mixed wine; Your belly is like a heap of wheat Fenced about with lilies.

esv.text: Your navel is a rounded bowl that never lacks mixed wine. Your belly is a heap of wheat, encircled with lilies.

cnv.text: 你的肚臍如圓杯， 永不缺乏調和的酒； 你的肚腹像一堆麥子， 周圍有百合花。

ccb.text: 你的肚脐好像圆杯， 不缺调和的酒。 你的腰好比一堆麦子， 四周围绕着百合花。
